subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath fulfilled His promise, manifested His sovereignty, revealed His signs, and made plain His straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انجز وعده و اظهر سلطانه و انزل آیاته و اوضح سبیله المستقیم و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love and unity
